hero.subtitle: Frontend Engineer with 2+ years of commercial experience building scalable internal tools, analytics platforms, and automation workflows. Specialized in React, Next.js, performance optimization, and complex integrations.

wunder.description: Digital marketing agency operating across 6+ countries.
wunder.title: Frontend Developer
achievements: Developed an analytics platform for aggregating and processing advertising data from multiple sources and analytical systems
Implemented complex UI: virtualized lists, multi-level filtering, interactive charts and dashboards
Integrated frontend with internal REST APIs, advertising systems (Yandex, Google) and Planfix task manager
Designed and developed scalable internal products from scratch as the sole frontend engineer
Automated business processes via CLI tools, browser extensions and Telegram bots
Built analytical dashboards using Google Ads and Wordstat data
Improved development and build performance by ~15x through migration from Next.js 14 to 16 and Turbopack adoption
Led migration of legacy projects to modern frontend stack and latest library versions
Integrated Google Vertex AI into internal workflows and products
Maintained design system consistency, conducted code reviews, refactored legacy code

clevertec.title: Frontend Developer
achievements: Developed frontend features for REST-based applications
Participated in CI/CD and automated deployment setup
Implemented responsive and cross-browser compatible UI components
